Class Room

java.lang.Object
adventure_game.Room
public class Room extends Object
Represents a room in the adventure game. Each room has a unique ID, description, and connections to adjacent rooms. It may also contain an NPC opponent and consumable items.
See Also:
  • NPC
  • Consumable

      r - The Room object to set as the room to the south.

    • isEnemy

      public boolean isEnemy()
      Checks if there is an enemy (NPC opponent) in the room.
      Returns:
      true if there is an opponent, false otherwise.

    • itemAvailable

      public boolean itemAvailable()
      Checks if there are any items available in the room.
      Returns:
      true if there are items, false otherwise.

    • getOpponent

      public NPC getOpponent()
      Gets the NPC opponent in the room.
      Returns:
      The NPC object representing the opponent.

    • getItems

      public ArrayList<Consumable> getItems()
      Gets the list of consumable items in the room.
      Returns:
      An ArrayList of Consumable items.

    • setOpponent

      public void setOpponent(NPC opponent)
      Sets the NPC opponent in the room.
      Parameters:
      opponent - The NPC object to set as the opponent.

    • addItem

      public void addItem(Consumable item)
      Adds a consumable item to the room.
      Parameters:
      item - The Consumable item to add.

    • removeItems

      public void removeItems()
      Removes all items from the room.

    • setPortKey

      public void setPortKey()
      Sets the port key status of the room to true.

    • getPortKey

      public boolean getPortKey()
      Gets the port key status of the room.
      Returns:
      true if the room has a port key, false otherwise.
